title: Logic Connective Truth Table Builder
description: A visual guide showing how to construct truth tables for the five basic logical connectives (NOT, AND, OR, IF-THEN, IFF) by systematically evaluating all possible combinations of input truth values.
relationships: Input propositions feed into the connective operation
The connective's logical rule processes the inputs
The result is a single truth value (T/F) output for each combination of inputs
All possible input combinations form the rows of the truth table
